from pyspark.sql.functions import *

users_path = silver_path +"users_cleaned"

silver_users_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(users_path)

dim_users = (
    silver_users_df
    .withColumn("client_id",col("user_id"))
    .withColumn("current_age", col("current_age").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("retirement_age", col("retirement_age").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("birth_year", col("birth_year").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("birth_month", col("birth_month").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("latitude", col("latitude").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("longitude", col("longitude").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("per_capita_income", regexp_replace(col("per_capita_income"), "[$,]", "").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("yearly_income", regexp_replace(col("yearly_income"), "[$,]", "").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("total_debt", regexp_replace(col("total_debt"), "[$,]", "").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("credit_score", col("credit_score").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("num_credit_cards", col("num_credit_cards").cast("int"))
    .drop(col("user_id"))
)

display(dim_users.limit(10))

cards_path = silver_path +"cards_cleaned"

silver_cards_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(cards_path)

dim_cards = (
    silver_cards_df
    .withColumn("credit_limit", regexp_replace(col("credit_limit"), "[$,]", "").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("expiry_month", substring("expires", 1, 2).cast("int"))
    .withColumn("expiry_year", substring("expires", 4, 4).cast("int"))
    .withColumn("num_cards_issued", col("num_cards_issued").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("acct_open_date", to_date("acct_open_date"))
    .withColumn("year_pin_last_changed", col("year_pin_last_changed").cast("int"))
    .dropDuplicates(["card_id"])
    .drop(col("expires"))
)

display(dim_cards.limit(10))

transactions_path = silver_path +"transactions_cleaned"

silver_transactions_df = spark.read.format("delta").load(transactions_path)


fact_transactions = (
    silver_transactions_df
    .withColumn("amount", regexp_replace(col("amount"), "[$,]", "").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("mcc", col("mcc").cast("int"))
    .select(
        "transaction_id",
        "txn_date",
        "client_id",
        "card_id",
        "merchant_id",
        "amount",
        "use_chip",
        "errors",
        "txn_year",
        "txn_month_name",
        "silver_load_time"
    )
)

display(fact_transactions.limit(10))
